calendar.matters:
MOTION Notice Of Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Nov-04-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER JAMES BOEDECKER Petition To Compel Arbitration Pursuant To Written Contract And To Nominate/Appoint Arbitrator:
APPEAR: James G. Boedecker, Esq. 381-2493 for petitioner & moving party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court grants the matter upon presentation of proof of service. Court provided the following list of arbitrators to be selected from: Judge Isabella Grant, Atty Martin Quinn, Retired Judge Eugene Lynch, Retired Judge Robert Dossie, Retired Judge Daniel Hanlon. Counsel to prepare proposed order. (302/AJR/ju) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
